about_p1: Hello! I'm Riyan Sugiarto, a dedicated Backend Engineer with over 5 years of experience architecting secure, high-performance core systems for the telecommunications and financial industries.
about_p2: My expertise lies in designing scalable microservices, modernizing complex legacy infrastructures, and optimizing large-scale databases. I am deeply passionate about driving business growth by slashing operational costs, maximizing system efficiency, and seamlessly integrating smart AI pipelines—such as OCR and biometrics—to build intelligent, automated workflows.
